transcript.text:
[She used to be my editor]
[Spying]
[This person here]
[I got you]
[You left me?]
[I will show you]
[Touched]
[Thank you for the compliments]
[We will show you what really happened]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Pyungtaek
There's this place I really had to visit
There's this editor I used to work with for over 2 years
She ended up leaving to open up her business
[This is her]
I live with her, but she has not been home too much

So I'm here to find her
[I've been wanting to come here]
[There she is]
[Over here]
[Gom-Z] [Gyeonggi-do, Pyungtaek]
[Where is she?]
[Spying on her]
Hi there
Why aren't you surprised?
Who creeps up like that?
[Just happy to see her]
[Let's see]
Did you make this?
You've seen it before You took it home before
You can act like you didn't know though
[She's so honest]

That looks tasty Is this everything?
[When are you going home?]
[This is all for you]
The quality looks good
Do you get it from elsewhere?
No~
[This is all made by her]
[All of this is made by her]
[More questions]
-Stop asking -Why?
-How much did you sell? -Not much
-30,000 Won -Really?
How much is that in a month?
[Lol]
[Calculating]
How do you pay rent?

[Stop hurting me]
Why did you leave me?
Cheer up
I'll come more often
[But don't ask about employee discounts]
So can I get some food?
[Taking her time to make the dough]
[Homemade cookies]
[Baked really well]
[After they're packaged]
[It's served]
You made a lot
[That's a mountain]
-How much is this? -Idk
I will be the highest buyer here
What's the highest?

-Like 200,000 Won or so
-How so? -When we first opened
What's the most popular here?
-Lemon Earl Grey Cookie -This?
Let me try it
It might not be right for you Because you have a kid's tastebuds
[She knows her]
Do I need to eat this grass?
-Is this edible? -Don't eat it
[What is this?]
It tastes weird
What?
Sorry, that's not what I meant
You know I don't like greens
That's good
-I didn't know you made cookies -Well, I do now

What kind of answer is that?
[Oh you know]
It's so moist Crispy on the outside
[What is she saying?]
What's inside?
Just earl grey and chocolate
It's really tasty
-I've never had this before -Yes you have
-I've never had it -Yes you have, I took it home before
-That wasn't me -Then who else can it possibly be?
Jingu had it!
[What is this blend?]
[Strawberry juice]
That's really tasty
That's really cute
[Counting how many there are]

[Still not finished]
[52 of them]
How much is it?
-Including the ones in the fridge? -Of course (Trust me)
This cup is really cute
I thought it'd taste bad
No, nevermind
You look different
That's good
I like how it's not too sweet
[The drink is on the house]
-Really? -You like it?
-Do you deliver? -Yes
-How about to my house? -Too far
You haven't even been home that much
This is what I had last time This is really good

I don't like cookies, but These are the best I've ever had
It tastes even better
It's more crispy and soft
[Hanrabong-ade]
This comes out better
This one is blocked by ice
It's so much better
-Everything I bring home is a day old -Really?
-I can't compare these with convenience store cookies -No doubt about that
The straws are too short
I feel like you just like white chocolate
These cookies are so soft But also so crispy
-Just give me an honest review -Honestly?
[If you want...]
No, but to be honest
These are really tasty

But those,
They're good, but
-I feel like you made them wrong -LOL
It's a little soggy
-It has bananas -I don't like bananas
No wonder
-What's this? -Oreo s'more cookies
-With marshmallows -Really?
Like s'mores?
Do you even know what those are?
A lot of people don't know it
I know it, I've heard of it
Too sweet
I need some spicy soup
I usually can't eat more than 2 cookies
That's good

[Really, I'm not lying]
At first, it was really good
But I want some kimchi now
[Let me just be honest here]
What?
Why did you quit?
Why do you think?
[Let's just laugh]
I just wanted to pursue my dream
Just something I can do on my own
Editing was something that was out of my control In making decisions
So I've been stressed about it
-Because of me? -No way
It was just something I was not happy about
-How do you like doing this? -Honestly, it's a little...
-Is it better? -Yes, Hahaha

I feel better, but the money is not there
I've been thinking about quitting this too
But It's hard for me to make that decision
-I won't say anything -I feel bad
The editor right now is doing better than you
When I told you before, it was not a big deal
It's because we live together and see each other anyway
I see cheesecake
That looks good Did you make this?
-Of course, I did -You make cakes too?
-This looks like the ones in the market -Yes, I sell them...
I'm sorry, it's hard for me to believe that you made it
This is real cheese
-I don't taste bread -It has no flour
That's so tasty
I've been wanting to try this It's real cream

-You really made this? -Lol
So tasty
Let me try the tiramisu too
[You're not forcing yourself, right?]
I can just tell by your reactions
I'm taste-testing forreal I'm being serious right now
The taste is very familiar
But the texture is different
Just the difference in texture
It's better
I came here to give an honest review
Everything was good except for the 2nd cookie
Soft is always better
Do you know any kimchi stew restaurants nearby?
[Found a new cookie]
This has white chocolate too

I personally like this the most
[Matcha Levain Cookie and Lemon Earl Grey Cookie]
Hey, I will buy everything here
-Really? -Yes
-Okay -(What?)
Yay!
[So casual]
[How many is that?]
[Busy counting the cookies]
[And so is she]
-Don't charge me extra (No worries)
How much? -199,600 Won
That's not even your best sale
Yes, this is a little under that
Let me buy a 50,000 gift card then
I want to be the highest here

She's a close friend of mine and also an ex-employee
She opened up a store here (Shy)
I was able to visit her today
Thanks everyone
[These 2 friends after filming]
Thank you
I said Thank you!
[And they also had dinner afterward]
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
